title: The W'd 2
body:
# The W'd 2
This modpack has been created for Nightfall Network, a public Minecraft server which is in development.

## What will you find in this modpack?
You can find mods ranging from Terrain Generation mods, to mods which add in tools and weapons! We have sufficiently combatted lag by installing various optimisation mods alongside the already 150+ mods installed onto the modpack, so there should be a great ratio between playability and enjoyment!

## Where can I find Nightfall Network?
We have a Discord server linked within our "Links" section. Feel free to join!
